_doc: A-19: pinned baseline for the escape-hatch ratchet (check_escape_hatches, runs INSIDE the
manifest-validate gate; CODEOWNERS-protected via /gates/). Invariant: every compiled surface
unit is tier-1/2 or a tier-3 registration with a non-empty justification; domain/<x>/ui/
modules unreachable from a registered ref fail compile. This file pins per-subsystem tier-3
COUNTS + the repo total (counts, not share -- share is gameable by denominator stuffing).
Any rise fails CI unless the same PR updates this baseline WITH a ledger entry (what grew,
why, the rejected tier-2 alternative). Reductions auto-tighten one-way: when the measured
count drops below the baseline, CI fails until the baseline is lowered to match.
At CUT-3 this baseline stamps as the permanent year-two ceiling (canonical plan SS11b A-19).
